market_pulse: Post-EDC Week stabilization in progress; competitors shifting to sustained summer weekend lineups with established residencies while LIV consolidates May momentum into June calendar.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Saturday night live (XS Chainsmokers tonight, strong competitor floor)
Omnia Dayclub booked Alesso (Jun 6 - High engagement brand)
LIV/Beach weekend lineup confirmed through mid-June
Temperature and weather optimal for pool venues
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Push premium table pricing tonight; Chainsmokers at XS will draw 3000+ capacity. Counter with LIV flash promos and Story updates on alternative EDM experiences.

content_gaps.description: Zouk (Mathame residency), Hakkasan (DJ roster rotation), and OMNIA (recurring acts) are running established artist anchors. LIV's talent announcements lag behind competitor storytelling cadence.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Announce Q3 LIV residency or talent lock-ins via IG/TT story series this week. Create '4-week lineup' countdown posts to compete with Hakkasan's Thursday/Friday/Saturday format.

content_gaps.description: #LIVMoments and beach club transformation posts are present but trailing Encore Beach Club's #EncoreVibe engagement and Omnia Dayclub's #OmniaSummer volume.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch #LIVBeachLife repost campaign. Incentivize user submissions with weekly Story features + 'Creator of the Week' shoutout with VIP bottle credit.

content_gaps.description: Competitors using trending remixes and production audio in Reels/TT. LIV's audio library skews mainstream; missing niche house/techno trending sounds.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Brief house/techno DJ crew to create short intro audio clips (15-30s) weekly. Seed Shazam-able hooks with #LIVOriginal tag in early Stories.

influencer_activity.mention: Posted EDC Week recap highlighting day vs. night venue transitions. Mentioned LIV Beach dayclub energy positively but no nightclub mention.
OMNIA June schedule greenscreen video gaining traction. Promoter cross-platform strategy active.

liv_outreach_targets.suggested_collaboration: Co-create LIV nightclub 'Day to Night' story series showing transition from Beach to Nightclub, positioning LIV as all-day/all-night experience.
liv_outreach_targets.notes: High-engagement creator with outdoor/pool + nightlife audience overlap

story_activity.summary: Alesso scheduled for Jun 6 (TODAY), Lavern Jun 5 — promoting peak summer lineup now.
The Chainsmokers performing Jun 6 (TONIGHT) — major artist pull, live now.
Weekend DJ slate (Marshmello May 30, Subtronics May 30, ongoing Jun schedule) — sustained momentum post-EDC.

venues.summary: Post-EDC Week calendar stabilization; David Guetta residency ended May 16, focus shifted to weekend DJ rotation and VIP table messaging.

raw_posts.content_summary: User post: 'Hearing Rock Ur World live >> Solved my FOMO from EDC by seeing Knock2 at LIV on Sunday and he did not disappoint!' Shows organic talent discovery and positive sentiment post-EDC.
LIV Nightclub event page promoting guest list + VIP table booking for ongoing weekend DJs.

venues.summary: David Guetta residency momentum ongoing; Strong user-generated content around pool scene and VIP cabana experiences. Fontainebleau uniform/branding integration positive.

Official calendar post: 'Fri, May 29 - @linska SAT, May 30 - @davidguetta SUN, May 31 - @sidepiece' — Weekend lineup locked in.

venues.summary: LIVE NOW: The Chainsmokers performing Jun 6 Saturday (tonight). Major talent pull detected in competitor calendar. Dillon Francis Jun 5 Friday already completed.
